column3: Coinbase is looking for a highly motivated accounting professional to serve as a Senior Accountant for the Coinbase Asset Management (CBAM) business.&amp
column5: This business is a registered investment advisor, commodity trading advisor, and is a premier institutional digital asset manager.&amp
column7: In this role you will partner with the business and act as an accounting lead on compliance, technical accounting topics and provide other finance insights.&amp
column9: The ideal candidate will possess a solid knowledge of US GAAP, compliance requirements for an registered investment advisor and commodity trading advisor, and a working knowledge of fund accounting.&amp
column11: ​​The candidate will combine this with exceptional soft skills necessary to be successful in this role including: being able to manage through ambiguity, executing against tight deadlines, maintaining strong relationships with finance and business partners and able to manage multiple deliverables simultaneously, doing whatever it takes to get the job done.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Manage accounting operations for CBAM including monthly close, account reconciliations and ensuring compliance with US GAAP.&lt
Liaise with the fund controller to review and record management fees from funds under management and&amp
column5: manage expense allocations in accordance with fund agreements.&lt

column3: Lead compliance activities as necessary based on the requirements for an SEC registered investment advisor NFA registered commodity trading advisor&lt
Prepare monthly and quarterly financial results presentations for CBAM management.&lt
Analyze data against business drivers to identify trends / issues.&lt

Stay informed on industry pronouncements, emerging trends, and developments in accounting, SEC regulations, NFA regulations, and fund accounting practices, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to provide accounting insights and recommendations.&lt
Prepare the annual US GAAP financial statements for CBAM and support annual audit processes.&lt
Partner with other members of the accounting team to implement new accounting standards, changes in accounting policies or to operationalize the accounting for new or modified products.&lt
Ensure compliance with internal controls, policies and procedures in line with Coinbase global requirements and assist in the design and implementation of new controls and processes.&lt
Ensure the internal controls related to CBAM are designed, implemented and operating effectively for SOX compliance.&lt
Streamline, automate, maintain &amp
column5: improve processes, systems and internal controls.&amp

column3: Enhance operational effectiveness and efficiency of the Controllership organization.&lt
Support management in completing special projects as assigned.&lt
Oversee vendor billing relationships by liaising with accounts payable team to address payments and queries in a timely manner.&lt
Prepare (or review) receivables and payables to/from fund entities.&lt
Liaise with Compliance and Regulatory teams for quarterly and annual filings.&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: Advanced knowledge of US GAAP, Sarbanes-Oxley, and COSO.&lt
Advanced knowledge of reporting and compliance requirements for an SEC registered investment advisor and NFA registered commodity trading advisor&lt
Experience in fund accounting.&lt
Experience in serving as a trusted finance and accounting advisor to business executives.&lt
Ability to work cross-functionally to obtain all relevant facts, understand the business requirements, articulate the accounting requirements and communicate the conclusions reached.&lt
Exceptional verbal and written communication skills.&lt
Exceptional organizational skills, timeline management skills and attention to detail.&lt
A desire to work in a fast growing, exciting and agile business.&lt
&lt
CPA.&lt
Knowledge of SQL, Python or other programming languages.&lt
Knowledge of blockchain technology and the crypto economy.&lt
Experience working in Netsuite, FloQast and G-Suite.&lt

column3: The Capital Markets Accounting team sits at the core of our expanding retail and institutional businesses, providing the accounting foundation for our rapidly growing Futures Commission Merchant and Broker-Dealer. We are seeking a Senior Accountant to drive finance and accounting processes, support new product launches, and ensure regulatory compliance, collaborating closely with leaders across product, engineering, operations, and legal teams.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Supporting timely submission of all required reporting to the CFTC, NFA and other regulatory agencies&lt
Supporting all aspects of monthly accounting close activities related to the FCM and Broker Dealer entities&lt
Driving preparation of monthly financial statements and quarterly/annual financial results&lt
Supporting all internal and external audits for the registered FCM and Broker Dealer entities&lt
Supporting execution of internal controls over compliance, regulatory reporting and accounting policies and procedures&lt
Monitoring the entities daily liquidity and capital requirements&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: BA/BS in Accounting or related field - CPA required&lt
Big 4 accounting experience&lt
FCM and/or broker dealer accounting experience&lt
Familiarity with FINRA/SEC broker dealer rules and regulations&lt
Familiarity with Futures Exchange / CFTC / NFA Rules and Regulations as they apply to a registered Futures Commission Merchant&lt
Familiarity with accounting guidance related to Derivatives and Hedging (ASC 815) and customer fund protection guidance related to FCM futures clients (17 CFR 1.20)&lt
Knowledgeable about investments with an interest in blockchain technology and cryptocurrency&lt
Expert project management skills and ability to support numerous projects&lt

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, ability to collaborate effectively with team members and business stakeholders, and promptly escalate material issues to internal stakeholders as required&lt
Exhibit solid analytical thinking, ability to work in a fast-paced, rapidly changing environment with excellent prioritization and organizational skills.&lt
Must have the ability to work EST hours to meet daily regulatory filing deadlines&lt
&lt
NFA Series 3 license&amp
Experience working at or with a publicly traded company&lt
Knowledge of SQL, Python or other programming languages&lt
Experience working in Netsuite, WinJammer, ION XTP, FloQast and G-Suite&lt

column9: As a Senior Account Manager, you will act as a trusted advisor, leading our most complex institutional relationships, ensuring an exceptional experience at every stage of the client journey while navigating the intersection of traditional finance and digital assets. You will deliver flawless service through proactive engagement, meticulous oversight, and a rigorous commitment to risk management. As a trusted advisor, you will master each client’s operational nuances to champion their requirements internally and influence our product evolution. Success in this role requires seamless partnership with key stakeholders including Sales, Operations, Legal and Product.&amp

column3: &amp
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: As a Senior Account Manager, you will lead and scale our most complex, multi-entity relationships across a number of segments including banks, fintechs, asset managers and corporates acting as the ultimate point of accountability for the client experience.&lt
You will serve as the subject matter expert for the Coinbase Prime platform, driving adoption of custody, trading, staking, and stablecoin services.&lt

You will serve as the primary escalation point for complex inquiries, driving rapid resolution by orchestrating seamless coordination with internal stakeholders to uphold best in class service standards.&amp

You will deliver a premium onboarding experience by managing the operational integration in partnership with stakeholders. You will manage the transition from initial configuration to live production, coordinating across internal teams to ensure a sophisticated, high-velocity setup that establishes the foundation for a long-term strategic partnership.&lt
Act as the central connector between Sales, Trading, Legal, and Product to dismantle onboarding hurdles and execute high-stakes strategic initiatives.&lt
Serve as a vital feedback loop for Product and Engineering, translating complex client requirements into scalable features that shape our long-term roadmap.&lt
Partner with Sales to lead technical product demonstrations, positioning yourself as the definitive specialist on Coinbase’s institutional capabilities.&lt
Act as a leader within the Account Management organisation by mentoring junior talent and institutionalising best practices to drive team-wide excellence.&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: Demonstrates the ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human-in-the-loop practices to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
6+ years of experience managing sophisticated institutional relationships within an investment bank, fintech, or digital asset firm.&lt
Exceptional verbal and written communication skills with a focus on influencing outcomes.&amp
Ability to foster trusted and lasting relationships with clients and internal stakeholders to deliver results.&lt
Understanding of risks across key functions and workflow to identify issues and concerns.&amp
Organized and independent working style to enable you to manage your book of clients effectively.&amp
Proven leadership experience, having served as a team lead or dedicated mentor in a high-performance environment.&lt
&lt
Digital Assets experience &amp
Extensive background in prime brokerage services, with a focus on clearing, custody, and financing for institutional clients.&lt
Proficiency in an additional European language, with a preference for French or German.&lt

column9: Coinbase stores more digital currency than any company in the world, making us a top tier target on the internet. Security is core to our mission and has been a key competitive differentiator for us as we scale worldwide. Essential to scaling is building and running a security compliance program that reflects how we protect the data and assets in our care, to open the doors with customers, regulators, auditors, and other external stakeholders. If you love working with fast moving companies to grow and scale security compliance engines and create positive change across the business, we’d like to speak with you about joining our team. Coinbase is looking for a Security Compliance Senior Analyst to drive the second line of defense IT SOX initiatives and help mature the IT SOX program.&amp

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&amp

column3: Lead Security and IT initiatives to support the SOX roadmap and advance program maturity&lt
Assist with SOX planning activities, including scoping of IT systems and creating training material to owners in preparation for SOX audit&lt
Lead security control gap assessments over SOX control environment, recommend remediation plans and track through completion&amp
Assess SOX implications of new products, update relevant controls, and communicate requirements to product organization and other stakeholders&amp
Provide ongoing reporting to stakeholders and leadership on above responsibilities and communicate progress and escalations management&amp
Perform SOX audit and control impact analysis as a result of security and technology incidents and partner with owning teams on control uplift activities&amp
Build close relationships with stakeholder teams including Security, IT, Infrastructure, Engineering, Data, and Finance to advise on SOX requirements and ensure excellence in control ownership&lt
Create and improve SOX procedural documentation, including process documentation, data flow diagrams, and uplifting templates&lt
Work closely with internal and external auditors to educate them about a complex technology control environment&amp
Oversee quality of audit initiatives, identify and analyze process gaps, provide guidance and expertise to team members&lt
Develop creative solutions to prove risk mitigation and solve for complex audit problems faced by the crypto industry&lt
Identify opportunities to address systemic program challenges, recommend solutions and drive efficiency through AI and automation&amp
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&amp

column3: Minimum of 5+ years of security/IT compliance or equivalent experience&lt
Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in Internal Controls over Financial Reporting, SOX 404 frameworks, and testing to support compliance&amp
Prior experience at a big 4 accounting firm&amp
Experience leading compliance initiatives from start to finish&lt
Proven understanding and audit experience of cloud technologies, AWS preferred&amp
Ability to effectively and autonomously accomplish outcomes across cross-functional teams in ambiguous situations with minimal supervision&lt
Strong oral and written communication skills&amp
Ability to multitask, direct cross functional work, and hold others accountable to committed deadlines in a fast paced environment&amp
Ability to communicate with technical / non-technical stakeholders to align on shared outcomes&lt
Experience in Financial services, Big Tech, or FinTech&amp
&lt
BA or BS in a technical field or equivalent experience&amp
Security certifications e.g. CISA, CISSP, CISM or other relevant certifications&lt
Experience auditing in Crypto space&amp

column9: Coinbase is looking for a creative and analytical Senior Analyst of Technology and Security Risk. You will serve as a member of the Coinbase Technology Risk &amp
column11: Controls team and support the implementation and maturity of our technology and security risk management program. Your risk team will define, quantify, manage, and communicate risks, and use outcomes to inform business decisions. You will serve as the subject matter expert in technology and security risk management operations, and will make these applicable and usable for fast-moving technical teams located across global time zones.&amp

column3: &amp
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Analysis of multiple variables, including but not limited to, threat intelligence and risks, to inform threat models/risk scoring methodologies.&amp
Enable risk informed business outcomes: Enable teams and leadership to make risk-based decisions by clearly communicating quantitative and qualitative tradeoffs.&amp

Manage risks throughout the risk lifecycle: Intake, triage, analyze, and calculate (inherent/residual) risk in collaboration with subject matter experts and risk owners. Facilitate agreement and documentation of risk treatment decisions
column4: pressure testing treatment decisions and validating execution of mitigation plans across stakeholders as required. Participate in continuous monitoring or risk treatment.&amp

column3: Reporting on risk posture: Support synchronous and asynchronous reporting on findings, metrics, and recommend mitigations to business leadership. This includes ad hoc and scheduled meetings with leadership and business risk owners.&amp

Maintain source of truth risk register: Quality control of data, tooling support, and implementing automation/process improvements to establish a baseline and iteratively improve risk management data and tooling.&amp

Communications and training: Support develop, execution, and maintenance of communication and training plans to roll out the technology and security risk program across the organization. Maintain team runbooks, team intra-web pages, and risk register metrics dashboards.&amp

Enterprise risk alignment: Work in lockstep with Enterprise Risk Management to escalate risks through the enterprise risk register and report relevant metrics to senior leadership as determined necessary.&amp

Global Engagement: Collaborate with stakeholders to help scale the program’s risk framework across Coinbase entities, products, and geographies/markets. Regularly collaborate with GRC teams, Legal and Compliance for risks, assessments, and reporting&amp
Support audit and regulatory inspections: Support data compilation to respond to US and international audit/regulator inquiries.&amp
Maintain an industry pulse: Maintain awareness of international regulation, emerging threats, forecasts, policies, and benchmarks&lt

Execute risk assessments: Execute technology and security risk assessments across our production and corporate environments, enabling the team to communicate risk in both qualitative and quantitative terms.&amp
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: 5+ years of experience working in a 1 or 2 LoD risk management function and/or Governance, Risk, and Compliance organization.&amp

Risk domain knowledge and best practices: Familiarity with standards and frameworks e.g. ISO 27001/5, NIST CSF, COBIT, ITIL, DORA, FAIR risk quant methodology to measure controls/risks, monitor controls/risks, and validating/racking/evidencing remediation.&amp

Technology and/or security risk domain knowledge: Ability to dig into technology and security risk solutions and to work on quantitative risk assessments across information technology and security domains such as vulnerability management, resilience, systems development lifecycle, infrastructure.&amp
Comfortable working with project management tooling (e.g. Jira, Archer) and quant and qualitative data analytics tooling.&amp
Clear/concise communicator and writer
column4: experience drafting/operationalizing project plans across stakeholders, holding teams accountable, and documenting deliverables to varying levels of junior and senior stakeholder audiences. Ability to translate controls/risk standards out of compliance speak and into functional requirements and across varying levels of technical stakeholders.&amp

column3: Regulatory familiarity: Working knowledge of major regulatory/legal frameworks (US/international) driving requirements across technology organizations.&amp

Navigating ambiguity and complexity: Ability to manage a queue against strategic priorities and shows expertise in being able to handle multiple assessments at a time. You are comfortable operating on an unpaved road and dealing with ambiguity.&amp

Drive for continuous learning: You are willing to learn and apply processes unique to the challenges at Coinbase. You have a willingness to embrace a steep learning curve and stretch opportunities to learn new skills.&amp
Excellent organization and project management skills in a fast-moving and demanding environment&amp
&lt
FinTech, TradFi, consulting, business operations technical program management or other customer-facing disciplines.&lt
Strong knowledge of risk/control issues in relation to evolving technology (e.g., crypto, mobile, cloud, data lakes, machine learning).&lt
Certification is a plus, but not a requirement: information security risk management qualifications like CRISC, CISA, CISSP, CISM, and FAIR.&amp
Coding knowledge a plus, but not a requirement (e.g. learn to build data joins, integrations with GRC and data visualization tools)&lt
Demonstrated beginner/intermediate knowledge of crypto/blockchain/web3&lt

column9: Data Science is an integral component of Coinbase’s product and decision making process: we work in partnership with Product, Engineering and Design to influence the roadmap and better understand our users. With a deep expertise in experimentation, analytics and advanced modeling, we produce insights which directly move the company’s bottom line.&lt

column3: Specifically, we’re looking for a Senior Applied Scientist to join our Retail Trading Team. In this role, you’ll take charge of pricing experimentation and play a pivotal role in determining our pricing strategy: you’ll spearhead testing design and analysis, find opportunities to improve engagement and our bottom line, and communicate your ideas to execs and leaders across the company.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Act as a strategic partner and collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders to develop pricing vision, roadmap and priorities&lt
Design and develop pricing models and their evaluation framework to determine optimal pricing strategy&lt
Develop causal models to help isolate the impact of fee changes using experiments and observational data&lt
Initiate, develop, and maintain data pipelines and data models with outstanding craftsmanship&amp
Synthesize findings, and recommendations in a clear and concise manner and communicate to senior leadership&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: Demonstration of our core cultural values: clear communication, positive energy, continuous learning, and efficient execution.&lt
PhD preferred, or a Master’s degree in a field such as Economics or Statistics with 5+ years of relevant experience.&lt
Minimum 5 years of experience in pricing experimentation, data analysis and statistical modeling&lt
Strong proficiency in SQL, Python, R, or other programming languages used for data analysis and statistical modeling&lt
Ability to independently create plans for analytics projects and a track record of overseeing large / complex analytical projects spanning multiple teams&lt
Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to explain complex data and analysis to non-technical stakeholders.&lt
Strong attention to detail and ability to work under tight deadlines&lt
&lt
Experience applying causal inference techniques outside of controlled experiments&lt
Experience working at or on a Crypto-focused company or at a crypto exchange&lt

column9: This role is for an Anti-Tax Evasion Compliance Associate within the Central Compliance team and will report to the Head of Anti-Bribery &amp
column11: Anti-Tax Evasion Compliance. The Anti-Tax Evasion (“ATE”) Compliance team is responsible for implementing and executing Coinbase’s controls related to mitigating ATE risk, including requirements related to customer onboarding and other areas. The individual will assist with handling ATE advisory inquiries and will serve as an escalation point for questions related to ATE risk and Coinbase’s ATE program requirements. In addition, the role will assist with certain core ATE compliance activities, including those related to governance of the ATE Program and assisting on ATE related projects.&lt

column3: To be successful in this role you will need to be quick to learn the cryptocurrency business, have a proactive, enthusiastic and positive attitude, and have a strong knowledge of ATE compliance best practices.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Assist with handling routine ATE related advisory requests and act as a point of escalation for questions related to ATE risk.&lt
Assist with ATE related projects, including designing and implementing controls related to the detection and mitigation of tax evasion risk.&lt
Create and deliver ATE training to diverse audiences.&lt
Provide subject matter expert support on anti-tax evasion risk assessments.&lt
Stay apprised of changes in the crypto ecosystem and the ATE regulatory environment, including regulatory rule making, guidance, and litigation.&amp
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: 5+ years of experience in a similar Compliance/Risk/Legal function or role.&lt

Working knowledge of anti-tax evasion and AML requirements, including familiarity with CARF, AML laws that include tax evasion as a predicate act, and the UK Corporate Criminal Offense related to the facilitation of tax evasion.&lt
Experience designing and implementing controls related to the detection and mitigation of tax evasion and facilitation risk.&lt
Highly collaborative and able to communicate effectively with varying audiences.&lt
Ability to synthesize complex information into concise summaries and recommendations&lt

Demonstrates the ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human‑in‑the‑loop practices to deliver business‑ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
&lt
Prior experience at a FinTech or a financial services firm.&lt
Foundational knowledge of the crypto ecosystem with a strong desire to learn more.&lt

column9: The Security/Technology Legal team serves as the primary advisors to the global security and technology infrastructure teams at Coinbase. The team counsels on a range of matters from incident response/reporting to security and technology program compliance with international and domestic information security regulations. The team also tackles unique Web3/blockchain legal matters in the cybersecurity and technology fields. The role will focus on incident response reporting obligations and information technology/security program governance obligations in regulatory contexts and as related to security provisions in contracts for vendors and customers.&amp

column3: Provide legal guidance to international operating entities. Includes responsibility for ensuring legal and regulatory compliance in the cybersecurity space of new products and services, inter-company operating arrangements, governance of cross-entity oversight, and proper reporting of security and operational incidents to relevant regulators.&amp

Continuously assess operating risks and legal needs and ensure that the legal department is equipped to provide outstanding support as Coinbase’s international business continues to grow&lt
Manage outside counsel effectively where they are engaged in connection with specific projects, while establishing your own strong domain expertise.&lt
&amp

Strong familiarity with existing and upcoming cybersecurity regulations&lt

column9: We are looking for a lawyer with deep experience at the intersection of digital assets, U.S. capital markets, and financial services regulation. You’ll join our product legal team helping support and evolve Coinbase’s portfolio of U.S. state licenses, including money transmission licenses and the New York BitLicense.&amp
column11: You’ll also advise on core product surfaces (including trading, custody, and related services) with a focus on digital asset support. This is a highly visible role across the company. You’ll need to build strong relationships with business partners and execute efficiently in a fast‑evolving operational and regulatory environment. You’ll collaborate closely with product managers and cross‑functional partners within and outside the Legal and Compliance organizations.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Advise on legal and regulatory issues related to Coinbase’s custodial digital asset products and services, including listing assets on Coinbase Exchange, supporting assets on Coinbase Custody, and launching new products.&lt

Serve as a key legal advisor on Coinbase’s U.S. state licensing matters, primarily money transmission and digital-asset licensing, including analyzing novel issues, supporting applications for new licenses, and directly engaging with state regulators.&lt

Enable the business with proactive, strategic product counseling—from product ideation, to drafting and refining policies and procedures, to conducting legal research that helps ensure products remain compliant with applicable laws and regulations.&lt

Communicate regularly and effectively with a wide range of audiences—including internal legal teams, outside counsel, regulators, and business stakeholders—across multiple forums such as executive presentations, regulatory meetings, and informal client touchpoints. Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to navigate complex inter‑departmental relationships are critical.&amp
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: Direct experience with U.S. state regulatory regimes affecting digital asset or payments businesses, including money transmission laws and the New York BitLicense regime.&lt
Knowledge of and experience with U.S. federal capital markets regulations (e.g., securities and/or commodities frameworks) and their application to digital assets.&lt
Baseline knowledge of digital assets&lt
Exceptional communication skills in a remote‑first environment, including the ability to explain nuanced legal concepts clearly to stakeholders at all levels.&lt
Excellent project management, writing, and time‑management skills, with the ability to manage multiple complex matters simultaneously.&lt
Excellent judgment, analytic rigor, and business pragmatism—you think quickly, are creative in solving problems, and are deeply comfortable operating within regulatory ambiguity.&lt
Willingness to roll up your sleeves—no job too big, no job too small.&lt
Active membership in good standing in at least one U.S. state bar.&lt
&lt
Knowledge of the proposed U.S. federal and state regulatory regimes regarding digital assets.&lt
Experience advising on consumer‑facing financial services products, particularly those involving payments, trading, or custody.&lt
Experience with unclaimed property (escheatment) laws and regulations.&lt
Genuine passion for the crypto industry and an interest in staying ahead of evolving market structure and regulatory developments.&lt

column3: As a Senior Account Manager, you will lead and scale our most complex, multi-entity relationships across a number of segments including banks, fintechs, asset managers and corporates acting as the ultimate point of accountability for the client experience.&lt
You will serve as the subject matter expert for the Coinbase Prime platform, driving adoption of custody, trading, staking, and stablecoin services.&lt

You will serve as the primary escalation point for complex inquiries, driving rapid resolution by orchestrating seamless coordination with internal stakeholders to uphold best in class service standards.&amp

You will deliver a premium onboarding experience by managing the operational integration in partnership with stakeholders. You will manage the transition from initial configuration to live production, coordinating across internal teams to ensure a sophisticated, high-velocity setup that establishes the foundation for a long-term strategic partnership.&lt
Act as the central connector between Sales, Trading, Legal, and Product to dismantle onboarding hurdles and execute high-stakes strategic initiatives.&lt
Serve as a vital feedback loop for Product and Engineering, translating complex client requirements into scalable features that shape our long-term roadmap.&lt
Partner with Sales to lead technical product demonstrations, positioning yourself as the definitive specialist on Coinbase’s institutional capabilities.&lt
Act as a leader within the Account Management organization by mentoring junior talent and institutionalizing best practices to drive team-wide excellence.&lt
&lt

6+ years of experience managing sophisticated institutional relationships within an investment bank, fintech, or digital asset firm.&lt

Exceptional verbal and written communication skills with a focus on influencing outcomes.&amp

Understanding of risks across key functions and workflow to identify issues and concerns.&amp

column7: re looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to drive key CX automation initiatives that directly impact millions of Coinbase customers and thousands of support interactions daily. You will design and build core components of our multi-agent framework - the system that orchestrates LLM-powered agent assist, automated customer conversations, and secure internal workflow execution.&lt

column3: &lt

Design and build intelligent copilot experiences that help human agents resolve cases faster, and improve our AI-driven concierge chat to handle more customer inquiries end-to-end with high confidence.&lt
Develop systems to detect and handle bad actors, protecting both customers and agents.&lt
Own key components of our multi-agent framework from design through production — spanning prompt orchestration, tool integration, and safety guardrails.&lt
Develop robust, well-tested Python applications with a focus on reliability, latency, and safety. Proactively identify and resolve technical bottlenecks to improve system performance at scale.&lt
Contribute to best practices for system design, coding standards, and evaluation frameworks. Support the growth of fellow engineers through code reviews, pairing, and knowledge sharing.&lt
Partner with Product, CX, and Security stakeholders through design reviews and ongoing collaboration to ensure features meet high standards for safety, scalability, and performance.&lt
&lt
column5: What We Look For in You&lt

column3: 5+ years of professional experience in machine learning and software engineering, with a track record of shipping production-grade ML services.&lt
Hands-on expertise with large language models and deep learning, along with strong Python engineering skills. You care about production reliability as much as model performance.&lt

Experience with the modern generative AI ecosystem (e.g., LangGraph, LangSmith, Google Vertex AI, AWS Bedrock, or similar). You should be deeply fluent in at least one and able to ramp quickly on others.&lt
Specialised depth in at least one of the following: NLP, information retrieval, conversational AI, or advanced statistical modeling.&lt
Strong communication skills. You can explain complex technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.&lt

Demonstrates the ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human‑in‑the‑loop practices to deliver business‑ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
A genuine passion for building an open, global financial system — with a mindset toward safety, fairness, and responsible AI, especially in financial services.&lt
&lt

Experience designing evaluation frameworks, analyzing model performance, and communicating results through clear visualizations and dashboards.&lt
Experience with responsible AI practices such as model interpretability, bias auditing, or AI governance in regulated industries.&lt

column9: Security is a primary competency at Coinbase, and the Security Operations team keeps a watchful eye over every aspect of it. Every day, we go to battle against some of the most sophisticated attackers in the world to protect billions of dollars worth of digital assets and ensure that our customers and employees can enjoy a safe, trusted experience. As Coinbase scales globally, our team is scaling along with it, using a blend of tooling, automation, and strategic team growth to ensure that we’re well-equipped to protect the next billion users of crypto.&lt

column3: The Senior Manager, Adversary Management is responsible for strategy, operational oversight, and governance of all aspects of cyber threat intelligence at Coinbase - to include ensuring intelligence support for the Security Operations and other Information Security intelligence requirements. The ideal candidate will possess a deep technical understanding of threat intelligence, cyber-fraud, blockchain (Web 3.0) and traditional (Web 2.0) threat landscapes. Reporting to the Senior Director, Security Operations, this leader will be instrumental in safeguarding the Coinbase environment, its products, and its customers by defining and delivering intelligence services that provide actionable intelligence and disruption of threat-actor activities.&lt

To succeed in this role, you must possess a battle-hardened technical background, with a comprehensive understanding of threat landscapes spanning both traditional (Web 2.0) and cutting-edge blockchain technologies (Web 3.0). We want someone who’s hungry and eager to disrupt threat actors and ruin their day. You will be the mastermind behind our long-term and day-to-day strategies, driving the development of our Threat Intelligence and Threat Research teams and services.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&amp

column3: Lead a team of threat intelligence engineers and develop a culture around disruption and deflecting threat actors away from Coinbase and its customers&lt
Lead and set the long-term and day-to-day organizational strategies and operational battle rhythm for Threat Intelligence and Threat Research teams&lt
Engage and partner with leaders internal to Security Operations, Information Security, and across the business to identify intelligence requirements&lt

Define and implement strategies and processes for identification, collection, and processing of prioritized intelligence from external and internal sources and maintain accountability for supplier-provided intelligence providers and tools&lt
Drive stakeholder engagement and enablement through timely threat briefings and reporting on adversary capabilities and intentions&lt
Establish and maintain technical workflows to identify intelligence requirements, to prioritize related work, and to deploy analysis or disruption initiatives&lt
Participate in crypto and community engagements to benchmark teams&#39
column4: capabilities, identify strategic and tactical requirements, and to increase maturity as related to cyber and blockchain intelligence&lt

column3: Have a niche for using AI across intelligence workflows from collection, dissemination and actionable intelligence. We know threat actors are using AI and we would want to stay ahead in the defender’s game&lt
Identify and define services and measurements (Gearing Ratio, KPI, KRI) in conjunction with direct-subordinates responsible for day-to-day operations&lt
Lead engagements with external intelligence sharing communities including FS-ISAC, Crypto ISAC, SEAL ISAC, etc.&lt
Maintain, revise and draft procedures and controls necessary to aid in effective risk and governance for all facets of the Threat Intelligence Operations and Automation function&lt
Prioritize mentoring, leadership, and administrative management of assigned personnel to include goal setting, feedback, and performance evaluation&lt
Perform other duties and/or special projects as assigned&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&amp

column3: You have experience designing, implementing, and operating highly disruptive Threat Intelligence technologies and services and possess a deep understanding of investigations and the threat intelligence lifecycle&lt
You’re able to mentor a group of highly technical threat intelligence analysts, teaching them a thing or two as you foster their professional growth as their manager.&amp
You’re up-to-date on threat actors, their TTPs, and their motivations in targeting the FinTech or Crypto space&lt

You’ve mastered the art of efficiently leveraging AI agents to be able to perform threat analysis, build adversary trends and proactive define strategies on building identifying and recommending disruptive capabilities across SecOps teams&lt
You are comfortable working cross-functionally with product, IT, and other security stakeholders to design and implement intelligence tech and services&lt
You are actively aware of the threat landscape, and understand the legal, regulatory, and ethical considerations of working with sensitive information and situations&lt
You are discreet, thoughtful, and seek to coordinate systemic, cross functional&amp
You are adept at translating complex problems into ‘byte-sized’, readily implemented (and preferably automated) solutions&lt

You have excellent verbal and written communication skills. Other team members ask for your input to communicate clearly and concisely and you are comfortable composing briefs and assessments consumed by leadership and training others&lt
You prefer to play as a team and are equally comfortable as the ‘novice’ or the ‘expert’&amp
Your high degree of empathy means that your coworkers trust you to help tackle their security problems, because you never come across as judgmental or condescending.&lt

Demonstrates the ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human‑in‑the‑loop practices to deliver business‑ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
&lt
Bring your vast network of intelligence resources and assets that contribute to the intelligence ecosystem at Coinbase&lt
Have a working or strong understanding blockchain and other crypto technologies&lt

Have experience in one or more of the following areas: incident response, risk management, counterintelligence, fraud detection, intellectual property theft, access and identity management, or IT engineering&lt

Experience pentesting AI systems and LLMs.&lt

Sitting within Platform PG, the Identity Verification (IDV) team operates Coinbase&#39
column4: s centralized identity verification platform, delivering the most trusted forms of customer identity verification in a secure, scalable, and developer-friendly way. IDV is critical to Coinbase&#39
column5: s compliance posture (KYC/AML) and security posture (ensuring the person accessing an account is the legitimate account holder). This role will own the end-to-end IDV platform, including vendor integrations, document capture SDKs, decisioning logic, fraud detection, and the platformization roadmap that enables seamless adoption by any Coinbase product.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&amp

column3: Own the end-to-end Identity Verification platform strategy, roadmap, and execution&lt
Drive platformization efforts to enable CUJ owners to configure IDV requirements, decision rules, and vendor preferences self-serve&lt
Manage vendor relationships and optimize routing across IDV vendors (Onfido, Au10tix, Persona, etc.) to maximize success rates, minimize fraud, and optimize costs&lt
Lead initiatives to combat synthetic fraud and AI-generated identity attacks through new detection features, challenges, and e-ID integrations&lt
Deliver composable IDV components (document collection, liveness, facematch, motion) that can operate independently for various CUJs&lt
Partner closely with Engineering, Design, Risk, Compliance, and CX to deliver world-class IDV experiences&lt
Define and track key metrics including IDV success rates, fraud rates, P90 processing time, and contact rates&lt
Build and ship developer-friendly APIs, SDKs, testbench tooling, and observability to accelerate product team integrations&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: 7+ years of product management experience, with significant experience in Identity, Verification, Trust &amp
Experience building and scaling platform products with self-serve configuration, APIs, and SDKs&lt
Strong technical aptitude with the ability to partner effectively with engineering on complex backend systems and vendor integrations&lt
Experience with vendor management, including performance evaluation, contract negotiation, and multi-vendor routing optimization&lt
Demonstrated ability to balance competing priorities across fraud prevention, user experience, and cost optimization&lt
Strong analytical skills with experience defining and tracking success metrics&lt
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Experience working in a regulated environment (fintech, payments, or similar)&lt
&lt
Experience with document verification, biometrics, liveness detection, or e-ID technologies&lt
Experience with ML-powered fraud detection or synthetic identity detection&lt
Crypto, blockchain, or fintech experience&lt
Experience with international market expansion and geo-specific compliance requirements&lt

The Identity Access team owns Sign In, Sign Up, Account Recovery, and Session Management — the front door to Coinbase for every user across every product. This is one of the first experiences customers have with Coinbase, serving millions of users globally across Retail, Exchange, Prime, Custody, and CDP.&lt

Our mission is to make access simple, native, and secure — with seamless sign in under 10 seconds, passwordless authentication, trusted biometrics, and easy recovery. We balance ease-of-use with security, protecting users from ATO while maintaining a delightful experience. This role sits within Platform PG and partners closely with Consumer, Insto, and Risk teams.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&amp

column3: Own Sign In and Sign Up vision, strategy, and execution across all Coinbase products&lt
Drive key metrics including sign in success rate, sign up success rate, time to login (&amp
Lead the path to passwordless authentication (passkeys, biometrics) and drive adoption of unphishable authentication methods&lt
Own session management, device identification, and session hijacking protection&lt
Partner with Risk on account recovery flows and ATO prevention&lt
Reduce duplicate account creation and improve returning user experience&lt
Balance compliance requirements (SCA, regional regulations) with user experience&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: 7+ years of product management experience&lt
Experience with authentication, identity, or security products&lt
Strong analytical skills with experience defining and tracking success metrics across complex funnels&lt
Ability to balance security/compliance requirements with user experience&lt
Experience partnering across multiple product groups without owning end-to-end UX&lt
Strong technical aptitude to partner with engineering on session management, device identification, and authentication systems&lt

Demonstrated ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human-in-the-loop practices to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
&lt
Experience with passwordless authentication (passkeys, biometrics, WebAuthn)&lt
Experience with bot detection/prevention, fraud, or ATO mitigation&lt
Crypto or fintech experience&lt
Experience with mobile and web authentication flows&lt
International product experience (regional authentication requirements)&lt

column9: As a Senior Risk Analyst on the Payments Risk Analytics team, you’ll be fully responsible for identifying and mitigating payments fraud risk on our critical payment rails without negatively impacting core metrics and the broader customer experience. This role will report to the Manager of Cards and Mobile Payments within Payments Risk Analytics, and will be based remotely in the United States.&amp

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Identify, investigate, and mitigate fraudulent purchase and deposit activity&lt
Implement logic targeting bad actors and high-risk behavior associated with unauthorized purchasing activity across multiple regions&lt
Measure fraud performance across payment methods and develop core metrics&lt
Proactively identify and close gaps in our monitoring&lt
Own risk controls from end-to-end and scale processes to provide appropriate coverage as we expand our business&lt
Own reporting processes and communication with relevant banking partners&lt
Work with internal stakeholders in Product, Growth, Data Science and Engineering to develop and drive forward custom risk management strategies and techniques for different geographies&lt
Use data to assess risk and make decisions impacting large segments of our customer population
column4: effectively measure and assess associated tradeoffs using quantitative analysis&lt

column3: Synthesize data learnings into compelling stories and communicate them to Payments Risk leadership&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: 5+ years relevant experience&lt
3+ years fighting Cards and Mobile Payments fraud in an e-commerce or financial services environment&lt
3+ years of experience in data analysis, working with databases, and querying (e.g., SQL, MySQL, etc).&lt
BA/BS degree in a quantitative field (ex Math, Stats, Physics, or Computer Science) or equivalent practical experience.&lt
Advanced experience using SQL&lt
Proficiency with business intelligence and data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Superset).&lt
A passion for fighting fraud and abuse, and the curiosity to self-drive investigations, identify patterns, and find the root cause.&lt
Proven ability to independently scope and deliver analytics projects while collaborating cross-functionally with Product, Data Science, and Engineering.&lt
Demonstrate our core cultural values: clear communication, positive energy, continuous learning, and efficient execution&lt
&lt
Experience with mitigating risk from issuing credit/debit cards&lt
Deep understanding of mobile payments&lt
Experience leveraging AI tools such as cursor, glean, copilot&lt
Advanced experience with Python&lt

column15: Ready to be pushed beyond what you think you’re capable of?&lt

column3: At Coinbase, our mission is to increase economic freedom in the world. It’s a massive, ambitious opportunity that demands the best of us, every day, as we build the emerging onchain platform — and with it, the future global financial system.&lt

To achieve our mission, we’re seeking a very specific candidate. We want someone who is passionate about our mission and who believes in the power of crypto and blockchain technology to update the financial system. We want someone who is eager to leave their mark on the world, who relishes the pressure and privilege of working with high caliber colleagues, and who actively seeks feedback to keep leveling up. We want someone who will run towards, not away from, solving the company’s hardest problems.&lt
Our &lt
column9: is intense and isn’t for everyone. But if you want to build the future alongside others who excel in their disciplines and expect the same from you, there’s no better place to be.&lt

column3: While many roles at Coinbase are remote-first, we are not remote-only. In-person participation is required throughout the year. Team and company-wide offsites are held multiple times annually to foster collaboration, connection, and alignment. Attendance is expected and fully supported.&lt

Our core mission is clear: build platform services to empower high quality staking products for our retail and institutional customers. This way, people don’t just buy / sell crypto, they “earn dividend” on crypto, and in the mean time provides security and decentralization for underlying blockchain networks.&amp
It’s backing the #3 largest revenue stream at Coinbase ($700M+ ARR) - and the #2 revenue stream that’s not market fluctuation dependent.&lt
The Coinbase Staking Data Team plays a critical role in supporting Coinbase&#39
column4: s staking products by building and maintaining reliable blockchain data pipelines and APIs. The team ensures the accuracy and scalability of staking data, integrates new blockchain assets, and assists in the development of APY boosting technology. By working on complex technical challenges, the team enables seamless staking experiences for both retail and institutional users, contributing to the growth of decentralized finance.&lt

column9: Coinbase is seeking experienced backend engineers to join our team to build out the next generation of crypto-forward products and features.&amp
column11: You will solve unique, large scale, highly complex technical problems, bridging the constraints posed by web-scale applications and blockchain technology. You will help build the next generation of systems to make cryptocurrency accessible to everyone across the globe, operating real-time applications with high frequency, low latency updates, and managing the most secure infrastructure running in the cloud.&lt

column3: Org Overview:&lt
Consumer &amp
column5: Business Group (CBG)’s mission at Coinbase ​​is to become the #1 financial app in the world, focusing on delivering exceptional consumer and business experiences across financial services, trading, and growth initiatives.&lt

column3: The Growth org’s vision, within CBG, is to grow Coinbase to a billion active users globally, by driving sustainable user growth through innovative acquisition, engagement and retention strategies, and building foundational infrastructure that supports long-term growth.&amp
Team Overview:&lt

The Growth organization builds features, products and systems that repeatedly and predictably drive user growth, through rapid and systematic execution. As a growth org, we take a holistic view of the user’s Coinbase journey, with teams focused on user acquisition, engagement and retention. We drive Coinbase’s mission of bringing the world onchain. By building and leveraging growth tools across multiple avenues, including referral and incentives programs, creating a world-class notifications system, building a dynamic, engaging, and accessible logged-out web experience, and optimizing our new user onboarding flow, we ensure that Coinbase is the easiest, safest, and fastest way to buy, hold, and trade Crypto assets, and ensure our new users are set up for success from their first interaction.&lt
Responsibilities:&amp
We hire and cultivate a world class growth engineering team with below attributes as our DNA:&lt
Impact-Driven&lt
Motivated by having impact.&amp
column5: Excited about delivering outcomes vs outputs.&amp

column3: Full-stack minded.&amp
column5: Willing and able to quickly pursue and validate any idea or hypothesis, with the skill to tackle problems that span product, backend systems, ML, data and more.&amp
column7: Not everyone needs to be full-stack, but we encourage it when it will enable flexibility and velocity.&lt

column3: Data-driven. Identifies and pursues high impact opportunities, backed by data.&lt
High Agency&lt
Understands how their work will drive meaningful impact to the growth of Coinbase.&lt
Takes accountability and actively seeks out opportunities to deliver results.&lt
Is equipped with all the tools and skills to build products and systems quickly.&lt
High Velocity&lt
Preferred mode of operation is fast.&amp
column5: Genuinely motivated and energized by moving quickly.&lt

column3: Knows how to balance velocity and quality.&amp
column5: Understand the importance of sustainable velocity, and prioritize simplicity when possible.&lt

column3: Invests in tools, systems and processes to increase velocity, as well as builds organizational relationships and cross-team expertise to break down organizational barriers that could hinder execution speed.&lt
How do we do it?&lt

column4: re building a world-class growth engine by developing features, products, and systems that consistently deliver user value from their first interaction to their entire journey with Coinbase. We do this in a systematic way by:&lt

column3: Rapidly launching, iterating and optimizing new and existing features and products to grow Coinbase.&lt
Building resilient and scalable systems that unlock growth at scale, and enable us to build, maintain and iterate on features and products even faster.&lt
Touching all parts of the stack including: web, mobile, backend, data and ML.&lt
&lt
Build and run experiments to power the growth of Coinbase’s retail products.&lt
Design scalable systems to solve novel problems with modern cloud technology and industry best practices.&lt
Articulate a long term vision for maintaining and scaling our backend systems and the teams running them.&lt
Work with engineers, designers, product managers and senior leadership to turn our product and technical vision into a tangible roadmap every quarter.&lt
Write high quality, well tested code to meet the needs of your customers.&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you:&lt

column3: You have at least 5 years of experience in software engineering.&lt
You’ve designed, built, scaled and maintained production services, and know how to compose a service oriented architecture.&lt
You write high quality, well tested code to meet the needs of your customers.&lt
You’re passionate about building an open financial system that brings the world together.&lt
&lt
You have experience launching new products from 0 to 1&lt
Experience with&amp
column5: growth experiments or A/B testing frameworks.&lt

column3: You have experience with Blockchain technology (such as Bitcoin, Ethereum etc..)&lt
You’ve worked with Golang, Ruby, Docker, Rails, Postgres, MongoDB or DynamoDB.&lt
You’ve built fintech, highly reliable and/or secure systems.&lt
Crypto-forward experience, including familiarity with onchain activity such as interacting with Ethereum addresses, using ENS, and engaging with dApps or blockchain-based services.&lt

column15: Ready to be pushed beyond what you think you’re capable of?&lt

column3: At Coinbase, our mission is to increase economic freedom in the world. It’s a massive, ambitious opportunity that demands the best of us, every day, as we build the emerging onchain platform — and with it, the future global financial system.&lt

To achieve our mission, we’re seeking a very specific candidate. We want someone who is passionate about our mission and who believes in the power of crypto and blockchain technology to update the financial system. We want someone who is eager to leave their mark on the world, who relishes the pressure and privilege of working with high caliber colleagues, and who actively seeks feedback to keep leveling up. We want someone who will run towards, not away from, solving the company’s hardest problems.&lt
Our &lt
column9: is intense and isn’t for everyone. But if you want to build the future alongside others who excel in their disciplines and expect the same from you, there’s no better place to be.&lt

column3: While many roles at Coinbase are remote-first, we are not remote-only. In-person participation is required throughout the year. Team and company-wide offsites are held multiple times annually to foster collaboration, connection, and alignment. Attendance is expected and fully supported.&lt
column9: On the Money Movement team, we’re building the core infrastructure for stablecoin-based payments, enabling fast, secure, and scalable transfers across borders and platforms. This work underpins how value moves across the Coinbase ecosystem and beyond.&lt

column3: As a Senior Software Engineer on the CDP Payment Risk team, you will design, build, and scale the real-time risk infrastructure that protects Coinbase’s developer payment flows — including fraud detection and transaction scoring across multi-currency, cross-border payouts. Beyond core backend engineering, this role requires hands-on ownership of ML systems: developing risk models, data pipelines, and integrating state-of-the-art LLM agents into automated risk decisioning. You will serve as the DRI for risk controls as CDP expands into new markets and payment rails (e.g., PIX, SPEI, Faster Payments), ensuring USDC↔fiat flows remain secure while maintaining a seamless customer experience.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: • Own critical risk outcomes across CDP’s payment platform, including fraud loss, abuse prevention, and user friction — continuously optimizing the trade-off between risk and seamless customer experience.&lt
column5: • Develop deep domain expertise in global payment systems and CDP products/APIs (onramps, offramps, transfers, payouts), helping shape a world-class crypto payment risk architecture as these platforms scale worldwide.&lt
column7: • Design and build state-of-the-art risk decisioning systems, including core components such as policy/rule engines, machine learning models, real-time scoring services, and autonomous risk evaluation agents.&lt
column9: • Architect and implement high-throughput data pipelines (batch, real-time, and streaming) that power risk detection, monitoring, experimentation, and model training at global scale.&lt
column11: • Develop advanced detection capabilities spanning classical machine learning, graph-based methods, anomaly detection, and agentic AI systems to proactively identify and mitigate fraud and abuse.&lt
column13: • Lead innovation at the intersection of risk, fraud, and agentic AI, conducting cutting-edge research and translating it into production systems.&lt
column15: • Contribute to the broader technical community through publications, open research, or engineering blog posts, helping establish Coinbase as a leader in next-generation payment risk technology.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: What we look for in you:&lt

column3: Minimum 3 years of software engineering experience&lt
Experience building real-time risk/fraud detection systems at scale&lt
Designing, building, and maintaining production services in a service-oriented architecture&lt
Experience with payment risk — chargebacks, unauthorized transactions, account takeover, payment fraud typologies&lt
Experience with rules engines and/or ML-based risk scoring (feature engineering, model serving, decisioning)&lt
Working with cross-border payment flows and the risk implications of multi-currency, multi-rail settlement&lt
Leadership skills to develop other engineers and influence risk strategy&lt

Demonstrates the ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human‑in‑the‑loop practices to deliver business‑ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
&lt
Experience in rapid company growth (from startup to mid-size).&lt
Experience at a fintech or neobank scaling risk systems from early stage to high volume&lt
Proficiency with Golang, Python, Kafka, Postgres, MongoDB, Redis&lt
Experience with event-driven architectures for real-time streaming risk evaluation&lt
Blockchain/onchain analytics tools (Chainalysis, TRM Labs, Elliptic)&lt
Experience decomposing monolithic risk systems into microservices&lt
Crypto-forward experience, including familiarity with onchain activity, DeFi protocols, and cross-chain transfers&lt

Developer Experience (DevX) is responsible for making sure all engineers at Coinbase build high-quality products while being productive and engaged. column9: The team manages everything related to a user&#39
column10: s identity at Coinbase. This includes login, signup, OAuth, account security, and multi-factor authentication. The Horizontal Frontend team within the Identity org is responsible for building and maintaining the frontend surfaces that power these critical user interactions. The team works closely with backend pods to deliver seamless, scalable, and reliable user experiences.&lt

column3: The team is also focused on migrating main frontend views to React Native, enabling a unified codebase across platforms. Additionally, the team is working on initiatives like multi-user and multi-organization support, ensuring Coinbase products can scale to meet the needs of businesses and organizations. The challenging part is building world-class frontend experiences while maintaining low latencies and high reliability, all while collaborating with multiple cross-functional teams (XFN) at scale.&lt
&lt
Build and enhance frontend experiences for login, signup, OAuth, account security, and multi-user/multi-organization support.&lt
Contribute to the migration of main frontend views to React Native, ensuring a unified and efficient codebase across platforms.&lt
Design and implement scalable, maintainable, and high-performance user interfaces using modern frontend technologies like React and TypeScript.&lt
Collaborate with backend engineers, designers, product managers, and senior leadership to turn product and technical visions into tangible roadmaps.&lt
Maintain low-latency, highly reliable frontend surfaces to deliver a world-class user experience.&lt
Write high-quality, well-tested code to meet the needs of Coinbase’s growing user base.&lt
&lt
column5: What We Look For in You:&lt

column3: You have at least 5+ years of experience in frontend software engineering.&lt
You’ve designed, built, scaled, and maintained production-grade frontend systems.&lt
You have expertise in modern frontend frameworks like React and TypeScript.&lt
You write high-quality, well-tested code to meet the needs of your customers.&lt
You’re passionate about building an open financial system that brings the world together.&lt

Demonstrates the ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human-in-the-loop practices to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
&lt
Experience with React Native or migrating web views to mobile platforms.&lt
You have gone through a rapid growth phase in your company (from startup to mid-size).&lt
Familiarity with authentication, identity, or security domains.&lt
Experience optimizing frontend performance for low-latency, high-reliability systems.&lt
Crypto-forward experience, including familiarity with on-chain activity such as interacting with Ethereum addresses, using ENS, and engaging with dApps or blockchain-based services.&lt

column15: Ready to be pushed beyond what you think you’re capable of?&lt

column3: At Coinbase, our mission is to increase economic freedom in the world. It’s a massive, ambitious opportunity that demands the best of us, every day, as we build the emerging onchain platform — and with it, the future global financial system.&lt

To achieve our mission, we’re seeking a very specific candidate. We want someone who is passionate about our mission and who believes in the power of crypto and blockchain technology to update the financial system. We want someone who is eager to leave their mark on the world, who relishes the pressure and privilege of working with high caliber colleagues, and who actively seeks feedback to keep leveling up. We want someone who will run towards, not away from, solving the company’s hardest problems.&lt
Our &lt
column9: is intense and isn’t for everyone. But if you want to build the future alongside others who excel in their disciplines and expect the same from you, there’s no better place to be.&lt

column14: Coinbase is seeking experienced backend engineers to join our team to build out the next generation of crypto-forward products and features.&amp
column16: You will solve unique, large scale, highly complex technical problems, bridging the constraints posed by web-scale applications and blockchain technology. You will help build the next generation of systems to make cryptocurrency accessible to everyone across the globe, operating real-time applications with high frequency, low latency updates, and managing the most secure, dockerized infrastructure running in the cloud.&lt

column3: &amp

column5: Coinbase Institutional - Making the Future Real&lt

column3: Without us, crypto is just a whitepaper. We make it real. Coinbase Institutional builds cutting-edge platforms that allow thousands of the world’s largest financial institutions to trade, custody, and participate in the global cryptoeconomy. From launching industry &quot
column5: to scaling secure infrastructure for hundreds of digital assets, we provide the trusted gateways for staking, governance, and web3. Whether it’s prime brokerage or international markets, we are building the scalable tech and seamless UI that empowers the biggest players on the planet to move money forward.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: Join us, and build the infrastructure for what’s next.&lt

column3: &amp
Within Coinbase’s Institutional Markets org, the Coinbase Exchange team builds the core trading platform that powers crypto markets
column4: engineered for ultra-low latency, extreme throughput, and always-on reliability.&lt

column3: As an Engineering Manager, you’ll lead a high-caliber team building and operating the systems at the heart of the exchange: order entry gateways, matching engines, real-time market data, etc. You’ll partner closely with product and cross-functional stakeholders to deliver institutional-grade capabilities that enable our most sophisticated customers to trade with speed, confidence, and precision.&lt
This is a rare chance to sit at the intersection of distributed systems at massive scale and performance-critical, low-latency engineering
column4: owning some of the most complex and high-impact problems in crypto and Coinbase. If you’re excited by hard engineering challenges, high accountability, and building the future of markets, this role is for you.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Lead a team of ~8 engineers building the next generation of Coinbase Exchange trading systems&lt
Own core exchange surfaces (order entry/FIX, matching, market data, and exchange APIs) end-to-end&lt
Drive ultra-low-latency, high-throughput, highly reliable systems at scale (24/7/365)&lt
Partner with Product, Infra/SRE, and senior leadership to translate strategy into quarterly deliverables&lt
Establish team mechanisms for high-quality execution (planning, reviews, testing, safe deploys, on-call, postmortems)&lt
Define and maintain operating metrics (SLOs/SLIs, latency, availability, error budgets) and keep them on track&lt
Triage and resolve incidents and partner issues quickly, with clear ownership and communication&lt
Coach and mentor engineers, raising the technical bar and growing future leaders&lt
&lt

column15: in this space, you will drive AI adoption across Coinbase by working within one or more AI Growth Pods — internal accelerators that partner with engineering and non-engineering functions to identify, prototype, and scale high-impact AI automation solutions.&lt

column3: You will drive initiatives from ideation to initial implementation and broader productionalization, while ensuring these solutions deliver tangible ROI and pave the way for broader AI adoption. This role requires a unique blend of strategic thinking, hands-on technical ability, and exceptional cross-functional collaboration.&lt
&lt

Partner with teams across the organization to deeply understand workflows, identify pain points, and uncover high-leverage opportunities for AI automation and efficiency gains. Translate complex business challenges into actionable AI use cases.&lt

Apply advanced GenAI techniques, including large language models (LLMs) and Agentic AI, to rapidly design, build, and iterate on functional prototypes (e.g., AI agents, custom copilots, intelligent workflows) that address business needs. Write high-quality, well-tested code in Python and Golang to support these solutions.&lt
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to evolve prototypes into scalable, secure, production-grade AI solutions aligned with long-term organizational goals.&lt

Provide guidance on AI capabilities, responsible AI usage, prompt engineering best practices, and strategic integration of AI into daily operations. Mentor team members on design principles, coding standards, and AI productivity tools adoption.&lt
Pilot new AI solutions with functional teams, gather feedback, iterate on prototypes, and support adoption to ensure demonstrable value and smooth transitions.&lt
Partner with central AI Platform and DevX teams to leverage existing infrastructure, contribute to shared knowledge bases, and ensure scalability and security of solutions.&lt
Work with Security, Legal, and Compliance teams to ensure all AI solutions adhere to strict security, privacy, and ethical guidelines, especially for sensitive data and high-risk workflows.&lt
Define success metrics, track ROI, and effectively communicate the value delivered by AI initiatives to stakeholders.&lt
Continuously research and experiment with emerging AI models, tools, and industry best practices to bring cutting-edge solutions to Coinbase.&lt
&lt
5+ years of experience in software engineering, with at least 6 months focused on applied AI, Generative AI, or intelligent automation.&lt
Strong Software Engineering Skills:&amp
Proven expertise in designing, building, scaling, and maintaining production services, with a strong understanding of microservices architecture.&amp
Ability to write high-quality, well-tested code that meets customer needs.&amp
Strong technical skills in system design, coding, and debugging complex technical issues to enhance system reliability and scalability.&amp
AI &amp

Hands-on experience with AI tools and platforms (e.g., enterprise LLMs like Gemini/Claude, no-code/low-code automation platforms, agent frameworks LangChain/LangGraph, Python). &amp

Highly analytical and structured problem-solver, comfortable with ambiguity and rapid iteration.&amp
Ability to manage multiple parallel initiatives and prioritize effectively in a fast-paced environment.&amp
Experience working cross-functionally with other engineering and/or non-engineering teams.&amp
Strong understanding of data privacy, security, and ethical considerations related to AI.&amp
&lt

column14: The Reliability Engineering team helps realize our vision by supporting Coinbase engineering teams to build software that is world-class in terms of its reliability. column5: Business Group (CBG)’s mission at Coinbase ​​is to become the #1 financial app in the world, focusing on delivering exceptional consumer and business experiences across financial services, trading, and growth initiatives.&lt

column3: The Growth org’s vision, within CBG, is to grow Coinbase to a billion active users globally, by driving sustainable user growth through innovative acquisition, engagement and retention strategies, and building foundational infrastructure that supports long-term growth.&amp
Team Overview:&lt

The Growth org builds features, products and systems that repeatedly and predictably drive user growth, through rapid and systematic execution. As a growth org, we take a holistic view of the user’s Coinbase journey, with teams focused on user acquisition, engagement and retention.&amp
Responsibilities:&amp
We hire and cultivate a world class growth management teams with below attributes as our DNA:&lt
Impact-Driven&lt
Motivated by having impact.&amp
column5: Excited about delivering outcomes vs outputs.&amp

column3: Full-stack minded.&amp
column5: Willing and able to quickly pursue and validate any idea or hypothesis, with the skill to tackle problems that span product, backend systems, ML, data and more.&amp
column7: Not everyone needs to be full-stack, but we encourage it when it will enable flexibility and velocity.&lt

column3: Data-driven. Identifies and pursues high impact opportunities, backed by data.&lt
High Agency&lt
Understands how their work will drive meaningful impact to the growth of Coinbase.&lt
Takes accountability and actively seeks out opportunities to deliver results.&lt
Is equipped with all the tools and skills to build products and systems quickly.&lt
High Velocity&lt
Preferred mode of operation is fast. Genuinely motivated and energized by moving quickly.&lt
Knows how to balance velocity and quality. Understand the importance of sustainable velocity, and prioritize simplicity when possible.&lt

Invests in tools, systems and processes to increase velocity, as well as builds organizational relationships and cross-team expertise to break down organizational barriers that could hinder execution speed.&lt
How do we do it?&lt

column4: re building a world-class growth engine by developing features, products, and systems that consistently deliver user value from their first interaction to their entire journey with Coinbase. We do this in a systematic way by:&lt

column3: Rapidly launching, iterating and optimizing new and existing features and products to grow Coinbase.&lt
Building resilient and scalable systems that unlock growth at scale, and enable us to build, maintain and iterate on features and products even faster.&lt
Touching all parts of the stack including: web, mobile, backend, data and ML.&lt
The Role:&lt

Coinbase is seeking a Senior Staff Engineer to join our team and build out the next generation of crypto-forward products and features. You will solve unique, large scale, highly complex technical problems, bridging the constraints posed by web-scale applications and blockchain technology. You will help build the next generation of systems to make cryptocurrency accessible to everyone across the globe, operating real-time applications with high frequency, low latency updates, and managing the most secure infrastructure running in the cloud.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Partner with the Head of Growth Engineering, EMs, and Product Managers to define and build mission critical systems to enable user growth.&lt
Build foundational systems that power growth across Coinbase: incentives platform, notifications platform and dynamic presentation system.&lt
Build and scale user experiences across all parts of the Coinbase product experience from SEO, logged out experience, user onboarding, search, discovery and referrals.&lt
Drive a holistic and unified engineering strategy that delivers engineering quality and excellence across the organization.&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you:&lt

column3: Ability to drive multi-quarter roadmaps with complex dependencies within and outside the Growth team.&lt
Strong track record of &quot
column5: technical leadership across multiple engineering teams.&lt

column3: Ability to drive quality and performance across complex systems at scale and understand what metrics and SLOs reflect product quality and how to move them.&amp
&lt
Strong cross-functional partnership skills, as this role spans across all of Growth Engineering.&lt
Experience working across all parts of the stack.&lt
Excited about working in a fast-paced environment.&lt
Excited and motivated about delivering impact to the business.&lt
