column9: The Core Automation team envisions a future where AI-powered operations lead to seamless, delightful experiences for customers and maximum value for shareholders. Towards this vision, our strategy is to 1) start with automating two key areas with Agentic AI: Customer Support and Compliance, 2) incorporate learnings from this automation experience and build primitives and orchestration solutions that allow us to scale and 3) scale across a variety of domains enabling AI to enhance every part of customer experience and internal processes.&lt

column3: It’s day 1 for us. We’re laser focused on automating customer support and compliance processes today. This is not just focused on driving efficiencies by automating manual processes, but reimagining what processes and systems must look like in a fully AI driven automated world, and then bring that vision to reality working across cross functional teams to offer a delightful customer experience, improving compliance posture and delivering outsized shareholder value.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Design and implement Agentic AI systems that power Coinbase’s customer support experience and compliance processes&lt
Design a platform (primitives, orchestration platform, tools, etc.) that would allow other domains to quickly leverage Agentic AI to automate their processes&lt
Interact with stakeholders in many different organizations that build Coinbase products or are responsible for financial operations&lt
Participate in shaping of the strategy and execution path of Coinbase Platform&lt
Manage individual projects priorities, deadlines and deliverables with your technical expertise&lt
Mentor and train other team members on design techniques and coding standards&lt
Write high quality, well tested code to meet the needs of your customers&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: 12 + years of experience in backend software engineering using Golang or similar languages&lt
Experience getting LLM based application to production&lt
Proven track record of delivering impactful solutions that power significant customer flows and processes&lt
You’ve experience in architecting and developing solutions to ambiguous problems with significant impact&lt
Strong technical knowledge of building distributed systems that process massive scale&lt
Solid communication skills and ability to communicate to stakeholders with various technical and non-technical backgrounds&lt
Relentless drive to set and perseverance to achieve ambitious goals&lt
Passion for building an open financial system that brings the world together&lt
&lt
Experience with LLM and Agentic AI. Measuring and improving LLMs’ grounding to a given corpus and experience reducing hallucinations is a big plus.&lt
Experience in the customer support, compliance or financial crimes domains&lt
Experience having made build/buy decisions&lt
&lt

column9: The CDP APIs are the easiest way for developers to get started with building crypto applications. &lt
column13: Conceived by Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong&lt
column15: , these APIs enable those with no prior knowledge of crypto to begin using crypto in under 30 seconds. The CDP APIs are positioned to bring the next million developers onchain, enabling trading, lending, payments, and more.&lt

column3: The CDP Wallets &amp
column5: Onchain Tools team owns both server-side APIs and client-side libraries across different languages. The team is looking for a dynamic software engineer to build a platform that accelerates web3 development. The ideal candidate is passionate about every aspect of an excellent developer experience: designing APIs and SDKs, authoring clear and informative documentation, building compelling onboarding flows, and incorporating feedback directly from customers. They must be comfortable working across both frontend and backend codebases and able to deliver high velocity and high quality simultaneously. The team includes some of the most prolific and tenured software engineers at Coinbase and is excited to ship a game-changing set of APIs and SDKs at breakneck speed.&lt

column3: &lt
Design, develop, and maintain ergonomic, open-source SDKs using Typescript, React, React Native, Android, iOS, Unity, and Flutter&lt

Work closely with many different teams at Coinbase to integrate wallets and onchain tools into internal products, ensuring consistency of concepts, style, and design&lt
Work directly with customers to collect their feedback and iteratively improve the Data APIs and SDKs&lt
Evangelize the SDK in the crypto community to gain greater adoption&lt
Build compelling sample applications end-to-end using the products to demonstrate their value and pressure-test the developer experience&lt
Troubleshoot and debug complex fullstack issues, ensuring stability, reliability, and security&lt
Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to maintain high code quality standards&lt
&lt
3+ years of experience in fullstack development&lt
Fluency in Golang, Typescript, React, and React Native&lt
Experience with user authentication, Identity and Access Management systems, public key cryptography, browser and mobile persistent storage mechanisms&lt
Established reputation in open source communities, with operational knowledge of how to grow adoption of GitHub repos&lt
Strong understanding of distributed systems, microservices architecture, streaming-based systems, and event-driven architectures&lt
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with an eye for detail and a passion for clear, comprehensive developer documentation&lt
Fluency with crypto wallets, including key management, cryptography, and blockchain protocols (e.g. EVM, Solana)&lt
Understanding of security best practices and experience with implementing secure coding practices for financial systems&lt

column9: Architecture (EAA) STP team is the primary engineering partner for the Sales Trading &amp
column11: Prime (STP) business, building and operating Salesforce capabilities that power institutional sales, account management, and billing workflows.&lt

column3: &lt
column11: on this team, you’ll design and deliver scalable, secure CRM and billing solutions for sales, trading, and account management users, while integrating Salesforce with pricing, contracting, and downstream finance systems. You’ll join a small, high-ownership engineering team that partners closely with Sales, Sales Operations, Account Management, Billing, and Institutional Operations stakeholders to unlock revenue, improve forecasting, and create resilient, auditable processes.&lt

column3: &lt
Design, develop, customize, and maintain Salesforce applications and platform capabilities across orgs using Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), Flows, and other Salesforce technologies.&lt
Own end-to-end delivery of features and enhancements for STP - from technical design and estimation through implementation, testing, deployment, and post-launch support.&lt

Build and maintain integrations between Salesforce and internal/external systems (e.g., REST APIs, event-driven integrations, middleware/automation platforms) to enable reliable data flows and cross-system workflows.&lt

Collaborate with product managers, admins, architects, and business stakeholders (CX, Compliance, Sales, Legal, Insto Ops, etc.) to refine requirements and provide technical guidance on Salesforce platform capabilities and tradeoffs.&lt
Provide demos of development to end stakeholders and engineering counterparts. Incorporate feedback into development and designs, expanding impact through direct, live consultation&lt

Design and implement robust data models (custom objects, relationships, sharing model), automation (Flows, Omni-Channel, assignment/routing), and configuration that scale with growing volume and complexity.&lt
Participate in code reviews, pair programming, and design reviews to maintain a high bar for code quality, security, and reliability.&lt
Support operational excellence through on-call rotations, triaging and resolving production issues, root cause analysis, and hardening of critical flows and platform services.&lt
Document technical designs, patterns, and runbooks so that changes are well-understood, auditable, and easy to operate over time.&lt
Mentor IC3 and contractor developers on Salesforce engineering best practices, helping to raise the bar for the broader Salesforce ecosystem at Coinbase.&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you&amp

column3: 4+ years of hands-on experience as a Salesforce Developer (or equivalent Salesforce-focused engineering role), with a deep understanding of core Salesforce platform concepts (Apex, LWC, Flows, security/sharing, packaging, and release management).&lt

Demonstrated experience designing and implementing complex Salesforce solutions in at least one of: Service Cloud, Sales Cloud, or Experience Cloud (e.g., case management, queues/Omni-Channel, digital channels, or partner/client portals).&lt

Strong experience building and operating integrations between Salesforce and other systems using REST APIs, Platform Events, middleware/automation platforms, ETL tooling, and Contracting tools (i.e. Ironclad).&lt
Solid understanding of software engineering fundamentals and design patterns, including testable architectures, separation of concerns, and performance/scalability considerations.&lt

Experience working in a product-aligned engineering team, partnering with PMs and cross-functional stakeholders, and translating business requirements into technical designs and implementation plans.&lt
Familiarity with modern engineering practices: version control (Git/GitHub), code review, CI/CD pipelines, CLIs, and environment management for multi-sandbox Salesforce development.&lt
Excellent problem-solving and debugging skills, including comfort working in complex, distributed environments where Salesforce is one of several critical systems.&lt
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to clearly explain tradeoffs, risks, and technical approaches to both technical and non-technical partners.&lt
Experience working effectively with a geographically distributed team, including aligning on EST or similar core hours where needed.&lt
&lt
Experience with marketing tools, specifically Salesforce Marketing Cloud&lt
Experience working on a platform or enablement team that supports multiple Salesforce product teams/orgs (e.g., shared services, reusable components, platform tooling).&lt
Hands-on experience with multi-org Salesforce environments, including shared patterns for integrations, security, and data modeling across orgs.&lt
Experience integrating Salesforce with internal platforms or AI/automation tooling (e.g., Workato, MCP-based tools, internal LLM/AI assistants, or similar).&lt
Background in regulated or highly audited environments (e.g., financial services, fintech, compliance-heavy domains) with sensitivity to data privacy, controls, and evidencing.&lt
Salesforce certifications such as Platform Developer I/II, Salesforce Administrator, or Service Cloud Consultant.&lt
Experience owning or contributing to engineering standards and best practices (linting, code style, testing frameworks, deployment patterns) across multiple.&lt

column9: The Sourcing Analyst – Services is part of Coinbase’s Source to Pay (S2P) organization within the Finance team. The team manages Coinbase’s third‑party services ecosystem across categories such as CX BPO, marketing and media, professional services, and corporate functions (Finance, People, Compliance).&lt

column3: In this role, you support the Strategic Sourcing – Services team by running structured sourcing events, negotiating commercial terms, and maintaining strong vendor relationships that drive savings, reduce risk, and enable Coinbase’s mission to increase economic freedom in the world. This position is ideal for an analytically minded, detail‑oriented sourcing professional who enjoys a fast‑paced, async‑first environment and wants to grow their career in services sourcing at Coinbase.&lt
&lt
&lt

Lead and support end‑to‑end sourcing for services engagements (e.g., CX BPO, consulting, marketing agencies, people/benefits, compliance, and other shared services), from intake in Zip through RFx, evaluation, negotiation, and contract execution.&lt
Partner with internal requesters to clarify scope, business requirements, timelines, and success metrics for each engagement.&lt
&lt
Support a high volume of contracts (40+ per month) in an async culture while maintaining a strong Customer Focus for internal stakeholders.&lt

Review and negotiate commercial terms (e.g., pricing, SLAs, renewals, termination, usage tiers) with vendors, partnering closely with Legal, Security/TPRM, P2P, and business stakeholders to reduce financial, legal, and operational risk for Coinbase.&lt

Serve as an external‑facing representative of Coinbase in vendor communications, reinforcing our expectations for service quality, data protection, and compliance with Coinbase purchasing policies.&lt
&lt
Perform qualitative and quantitative analysis on vendor proposals, pricing models, and spend/usage data to support award recommendations and category strategies for Services.&lt
Contribute to spend management initiatives focused on savings, process efficiency, supplier consolidation, risk reduction, and improved transparency and control of expenditures.&lt
Help maintain vendor tiering/segmentation and category plans for Services, including views of top vendors, concentration, pipeline, and savings tracking.&lt
&lt
Use Zip, Ironclad, and Google Workspace to manage sourcing workflows, contracts, and documentation, ensuring data quality, auditability, and adherence to S2P SLAs.&lt
Keep sourcing Desktop Procedures (DTPs), playbooks, and templates for Services current, accurate, and easy for stakeholders and BPO partners to follow
column4: proactively identify and close documentation gaps.&lt

column3: Collaborate with BPO partners to balance volume, improve cycle times, and maintain a consistent stakeholder experience.&lt
&lt

Communicate clearly and asynchronously (Slack, Docs, Sheets) to provide status updates, surface risks, and explain the impact of sourcing decisions to business partners and leadership.&lt
&lt

column9: Coinbase’s Special Investigations Team prides itself on being on the front lines of the financial revolution, protecting Coinbase from emerging novel threats. On the Special Investigations team, they will take on high-risk escalations and proactive research into potential threat actors. The role will also include corporate diligence and OSINT gathering, with a focus on Latin American sources. The investigator will help support high risk urgent cases, special projects, develop, refine and automate new and existing tools.&lt

column3: A defining trait of any successful investigator is inquisitiveness - someone who questions premises and never takes things at face value, while always fact-checking their own intuition. Ideally, our prospective candidate should be a crypto-forward individual with a drive to see beyond the curve, strong knowledge of various networking protocols and an artful touch of OSINT expertise.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Handle high-risk escalations to discover findings beyond initial flags
Conduct proactive research, including ad hoc due diligence
Study threat actors, their environments and modus operandi
Remain current with industry developments including blockchain trends, network protocols, threat actor landscape, and applicable regulation
Feedback loop research findings to improve investigative tools and compliance controls
Respond to assistance requests from fellow Investigators
Handle highly sensitive cases with respective urgency and discretion
Master evolving investigative tools for blockchain analytics, social media platforms with emphasis on identity research, data extraction and analysis
Create new investigative techniques and teach them to the Investigations team
Other duties and responsibilities as required or assigned.&amp
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: A well-organized self-starter who is able to constantly learn and work autonomously
Ability to handle highly sensitive information
Excellent writing, analytical and communication prowess
Strong understanding of Latin American financial systems and money laundering typologies
Working knowledge of financial services regulations concerning money laundering and sanctions
OSINT expertise and investigative mindset (Latam-focused expertise is a big plus)
Deep knowledge of social media platforms, corporate diligence sources and other tools for identity research
Knowledge of blockchains and various network protocols
Fluency in Spanish&lt

column9: Data Science is an integral component of Coinbase’s product and decision making process: we work in partnership with Product, Engineering and Design to influence the roadmap and better understand our users. With a deep expertise in experimentation, analytics and advanced modeling, we produce insights which directly move the company’s bottom line.&lt

column3: We’re looking for a Staff Data Scientist to join our Base app team. Base app is our solution that allows individuals to custody their own crypto in a censorship resistant way. As a Staff Data Scientist, you’ll be working closely with multiple teams that are collectively working towards improving the app’s growth. Sample projects include building out growth models, creating and mapping input metrics to various teams, devising experimentation frameworks to measure incrementality, and utilizing blockchain data to unlock new product opportunities.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&amp

column3: Devise testing plan to better understand key product metrics and inform product strategy.&lt
Act as a strategic partner to functional teams: initiate and execute deep analyses and models to help prioritize opportunities and provide actionable recommendations.&lt
Build new analytics and machine learning models that improve both our insights and the product directly.&lt
Measure business performance, develop / refine core metrics and create reporting to understand and monitor them.&lt
Synthesize data learnings into compelling stories and communicate them throughout Coinbase and to senior executives.&lt
Initiate, develop,and maintain data pipelines and data models with outstanding craftsmanship.&amp
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&amp

column3: BA / BS degree or equivalent practical experience. 8+ years relevant experience, or a PhD degree in related fields + 5 years.&amp
Demonstration of our core cultural values: clear communication, positive energy, continuous learning, and efficient execution.&lt
Understanding of statistical concepts and experience in applying them.&lt
Related, understanding of experimentation best practices and concepts (e.g., incrementality, cannibalization, etc.)&lt
Experience in data analyses using SQL.&lt
Experience in at least one programming language (preferably Python).&lt
Ability to independently create plans for analytics projects and a track record of overseeing large / complex analytical projects spanning multiple teams.&lt
&lt
Previous experience working in crypto is a plus.&lt
Domain experience in product, marketing, growth, and/or other business analytics areas.&lt

column9: The Core Automation Team is a highly driven and innovative group dedicated to developing AI infrastructure and automation solutions that enhance productivity, foster innovation, and create meaningful customer impact across Coinbase. Our mission is to streamline operations for customer support and compliance teams while delivering exceptional customer experiences. As a Machine Learning Engineer on our team, you will play a key role in this transformation, utilizing state-of-the-art AI models, frameworks, and tools, along with diverse and extensive data sources, including blockchain data. Your work will focus on breaking down barriers to cryptocurrency adoption and shaping the future of AI-powered customer interactions.&lt

Drive project execution by managing priorities, deadlines, and deliverables, leveraging your technical expertise.&lt
Develop high-quality, well-tested Python code to address critical product and business needs.&lt
Design scalable, secure systems using state-of-the-art AI/ML technologies and industry best practices.&lt
Mentor team members on design principles, coding standards, and the adoption of AI productivity tools.&lt
Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues to improve system reliability, scalability, and operational efficiency.&lt
Ensure the security, scalability, and architectural integrity of feature designs through thorough reviews across teams.&lt
&lt

column3: 8+ years of experience in machine learning and software engineering.&lt
Proven expertise in designing, building, scaling, and maintaining production services, with a strong focus on data processing/machine learning/analytics.&lt
Hands-on experience with at least one ML model type, such as LLMs, GNNs, Deep Learning, Logistic Regression, or Gradient Boosting Trees.&lt
Proficiency in one or more areas, including data mining, information retrieval, advanced statistics, natural language processing, or computer vision.&lt
Ability to write high-quality, well-tested code that effectively addresses customer needs.&lt
Experience mentoring and developing junior engineers by implementing processes and setting a high standard for excellence.&lt
Passion for building an open financial system that connects the world.&lt
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with a commitment to open and transparent cultural practices.&lt
&lt
Bachelor’s, Master’s, or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Data Mining, Statistics, or a related technical field.&lt
Proficiency with GenAI frameworks/tools and technologies such as Apache Airflow, Spark, Flink, Kafka/Kinesis, Snowflake, and Databricks.&lt
Familiarity with model interpretability and responsible AI practices.&lt
Expertise in data analysis and visualization.&lt

column9: Coinbase Infrastructure Security (InfraSec) is at the forefront of protecting the foundation of Coinbase’s infrastructure and platform services. This role partners closely with engineering teams to design, implement, and automate cutting-edge security solutions across complex cloud and containerized environments. Leveraging deep expertise in technologies like Kubernetes and AWS, this position serves as a trusted advisor to cross-functional teams and senior leaders, driving strategic decisions that balance security, scalability, and business enablement.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Designing, implementing, and maintaining security controls across multi-cloud environments (AWS, GCP, etc.), Kubernetes clusters, and containerized workloads (Docker).&lt
Developing secure-by-default patterns for infrastructure-as-code (Terraform) and container orchestration platforms.&lt
Writing code in Go to automate security processes, enforce guardrails, and integrate security solutions.&lt
Conducting security reviews of cloud architecture, data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks), and routing configurations to identify vulnerabilities and recommend improvements.&lt
Partnering with engineering teams to embed security into the design and deployment of platform services.&lt
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to align security initiatives with business goals, balancing security, risk, and enablement.&lt
Evaluating security needs during mergers and acquisitions (M&amp
column5: A) and ensuring acquired companies are integrated into secure paved road frameworks.&lt

column3: Influencing senior leaders and stakeholders on technical decisions, risk management strategies, and tradeoffs to drive secure and scalable outcomes.&lt
Driving continuous improvement of security policies, threat detection mechanisms, and incident response automations.&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: At least 7 years of experience in infrastructure security, with strong expertise in both AWS and Kubernetes, and deep SME-level knowledge in at least one.&lt
Proficiency in writing Go for automation and guardrails, and deploying infrastructure with Terraform.&lt
Expertise across modern cloud and containerized platform technologies, including securing data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks) and cloud edge security.&lt
Proven ability to partner with engineering, product, and business teams to align security initiatives with broader company goals.&lt
Experience influencing senior leaders and stakeholders on technical decisions, risk tradeoffs, and enablement strategies.&lt
An execution-focused approach, capable of navigating ambiguity and delivering impactful results.&lt
A commitment to advancing an open financial system that connects the world.&lt
&lt
Experience with hybrid cloud and on-prem environments, including platforms like GCP and Vercel, to secure infrastructure in a multi-cloud company alongside AWS and on-prem systems.&lt
Proficiency in crafting Rego rules for Open Policy Agent (OPA) or similar tools to enforce security policies at scale.&lt
Physical networking and datacenter experience, including securing physical infrastructure and managing network hardware in datacenter environments.&lt

column9: The Top of Funnel team is responsible for capturing organic user interest through SEO and optimizing the logged-out web experience to convert curious visitors into Coinbase users. We serve over 5 million pageviews per month across critical logged-out surfaces including Asset Detail Pages, How-to-Buy pages, Converter pages, and marketing landing pages.&lt
column11: We are seeking a Staff Software Engineer with deep frontend expertise and strong backend capabilities to lead technical strategy across our logged-out web platform. You will architect and build performant, SEO-optimized web experiences, define the future of our marketing attribution and user tracking, and ensure our Marketing Server infrastructure delivers reliable, scalable SSR at the edge. This role requires someone who can work across the full stack — from React/Next.js frontend to Node.js/Go backend services — while driving technical leadership and mentoring engineers across the team.&lt
column13: As Coinbase expands into the Everything Exchange — spanning equities, derivatives, prediction markets, and DEX assets — our team is building the scalable programmatic systems that generate millions of SEO-optimized pages and the self-serve marketing tools that reduce engineering dependency. You&#39
column14: ll be at the center of this effort, shaping the technical strategy that powers how the world discovers Coinbase.&lt

column3: Drive rapid experimentation by leveraging best practices and tooling to create a repeatable, simple framework for quick logged-out experimentation&lt
Build and optimize programmatic SEO pages that scale across millions of assets (crypto, equities, derivatives, prediction markets)&lt
Optimize logged-out web experiences for SEO, web performance, and user conversion&lt
Architect multi-product logged-out experiences to support Coinbase&#39
Scale marketing and user tracking to enable marketing teams to effectively manage and optimize campaigns across multiple user segments and channels&lt
Improve marketing attribution, measurement, and data quality across ad platforms&lt
Provide technical leadership across the team and work closely with management and stakeholders to define strategic roadmaps&lt
Mentor and coach engineers across the team on design techniques, coding standards, and growth engineering best practices&lt
Identify and drive technical debt reduction and performance improvements across the logged-out platform&lt
What we look for in you:&lt

column9: ​​The Retail Cash team provides the foundational cash layer for Coinbase’s Consumer business. We make it possible for users to reliably hold, fund, withdraw, and route cash to every experience across Coinbase—from simple buys and sells to advanced trading and new Consumer products. Our systems must be highly reliable, auditable, and globally scalable.&lt

column3: As a Staff Engineer, you will be the technical anchor for Cash services. You will define the architecture and roadmap for core cash capabilities, ensuring that any team at Coinbase can depend on a robust, secure, and always‑on cash foundation.You will be part of the vision to build a compelling and trusted single cash balance that serves Everything Exchange users’ risk‑off needs.&lt

This role is for an engineer who thrives on tackling complex, high-impact distributed systems that require high reliability and performance—especially in a trading and financial technology context.&lt
&lt
Serve as the technical leader and strategist for the Consumer Cash team, defining multi-quarter technical strategies that intersect multiple financial products.&lt
Architect, develop, and own distributed systems that power low-latency APIs and event‑driven pipelines that process large volumes of cash transactions with strong correctness guarantees.&lt
Provide technical structure and partner closely with management and stakeholders to translate business goals into a defined strategic roadmap.&lt
Design and implement foundational, high-performance infrastructure components, leveraging tools like Kafka and Clickhouse in an event-sourced architecture.&lt
Manage individual project priorities, deadlines, and deliverables with strong technical expertise.&lt
Mentor and coach other team members on advanced design techniques, coding standards, and best practices for building robust value-add products.&lt
Leverage our modern, diverse tech stack to write high-quality, production-ready code that is thoroughly tested and delivers a critical product to market.&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you:&lt

column3: 8+ years of experience in software engineering, with significant experience architecting and developing solutions to ambiguous, high-impact problems.&lt
Demonstrated experience with low-latency, event-driven, or distributed systems.&lt
A strong signal if you have a background in building consumer facing trading products or any application that handles large amounts of streaming data.&lt
Passion for building an open financial system that brings the world together.&lt
Intellectual curiosity, openness, and a passion for building a culture of positive energy and blameless truth-seeking.&lt
&lt
Experience in payments, banking, wallets, or trading systems, especially transaction processing or ledgering.&lt
Familiarity with the tech stack, including Golang, Clickhouse, Kafka, Redis, MongoDB.&lt
Experience building financial, high reliability, or security systems.&lt
Background in Blockchains (such as Bitcoin, Ethereum) or crypto-forward experience (e.g., interacting with Ethereum addresses, ENS, dApps).&lt
Experience with a company going through rapid growth (from 10 to 100s of engineers).&lt

column9: As a Supervisor for the Concierge on the Customer Success Team, you will lead a specialized team of customer focused Concierge Agents who own high value customer relationships that are essential to Coinbase achieving its mission. Using your customer support, operations, and team leadership skills you will play a crucial role ensuring we deliver an outstanding high value customer experience globally.&lt

column3: &lt

column3: Manage and support initiatives aimed at streamlining operations and improving customer experience metrics.&lt
Achieve SLAs, productivity and quality metrics for your line of business/team members.&lt
Collaborate cross-functionally with Program, Quality and Training teams to improve existing workflows and processes.&lt
Provide a best in class experience for our customers through effective stakeholder management, task management, decisive prioritization, and efficient execution.&lt
Handle customer escalations to resolution, including collaborating across teams of subject matter specialists.&lt
Model an investigative mentality to help address critical customer issues at the root cause.&lt
Represent and advocate for the customer across organizations to drive impactful changes.&lt
Champion clear communication with internal and external partners to align on solutions and drive results.&lt
Serve as an escalation point for the Customer Experience organization for dedicated Consumer customer accounts.&lt
Proactively identify customer needs before they become an issue to simplify the customer experience, reduce friction, and strengthen trust in Coinbase.&lt
Identify opportunities to enhance the customers experience with Coinbase, unlocking potential to adopt additional features, services, and products.&lt
&lt

column3: Experienced and passionate people leader with a proven track record of guiding and developing teams.&lt

Minimum of 3 years of relevant experience in an enterprise customer / account management / advisory role in a fast paced environment.&amp
Basic knowledge of blockchain, infrastructure, staking, ROI/staking rewards, custody, and/or crypto.&lt
Experience working with Google Suite (Slides, Doc and Sheets) + overall presentation preparation.&lt
Fantastic communication skills in order to operate across multiple departments and&amp
Flexible and adaptable to meet the evolving needs of a high-growth and fast paced organization.&lt
Experience in Banking, Wealth Management, Corporate Finance, Asset Management, FinTech or Crypto.&lt

FINRA License series 7 and 63 (will not initially be sponsoring licenses)&lt
FINRA License 24 &lt

column3: The Tax Information Reporting intern will be an integral part of the Coinbase Tax team supporting the day to day operations of the global tax information reporting and withholding function. This role will primarily focus on domestic and international global tax information reporting and withholding and collaborate in all aspects of Coinbase’s compliance with these requirements. The candidate also will work closely with the broader Coinbase product, platform and data functions and help drive initiatives for continuous process improvements.&lt

The Coinbase Tax team ensures that Coinbase complies fully with its tax obligations in all of the jurisdictions in which Coinbase operates. This includes building a world class set of tax protocols adapted for the holding, purchase, sale and trading of digital assets. We are passionate about tax and crypto, and we are looking for an ideal candidate with a similar passion and collaborative focus to join our world class team!&lt
&lt

Collaborate on AI-driven initiatives to streamline operational workflows and enhance customer inquiry responses&lt
Present your completed project to managers, team guides, and leadership&lt

column9: Coinbase is hiring a Technical Account Manager - API Specialist to support and integrate institutional trading clients onto Coinbase’s exchange and API platform and the ideal candidate should have a background that blends technical expertise with high-level relationship management. This role sits at the intersection of electronic trading, APIs, and production systems and is responsible for onboarding market participants, troubleshooting live trading issues, and ensuring reliable order flow between client trading systems and Coinbase infrastructure.&lt

column3: &lt
&lt
Own all technical and product initiatives for assigned accounts, working with Sales and Account Managers to ensure client retention and increase enterprise account penetration.&lt
Maintain relationships with 50+ clients to provide comprehensive Tier 1-3 coverage.&lt
Collaborate with Account Managers to map account structures, identify decision-makers, and establish technical operation touch points.&lt
&lt
Gather product requirements from customers and champion these within Coinbase Product and Engineering teams.&lt
Work closely with product teams to provide customers with product roadmap updates.&lt
Develop scalable tactical and strategic solutions to address clients’ technical needs and gaps.&lt
Build a deep understanding of customer environments and operational constraints, ensuring customer configurations are documented and integrated into the product development lifecycle.&lt
&lt
Work with assigned accounts to establish well-defined technical and business processes for both cloud and on-premise deployments.&lt
Coordinate go-to-market strategies for new product features to optimize the customer experience.&lt
Provide detailed reviews of operational performance, metrics, and service disruptions to both management and customers.&lt
Offer API development support and best practices guidance to clients during onboarding, covering all Coinbase API suite product lines.&lt
Assist Engineers in troubleshooting technical issues and service outages for assigned accounts.&lt
Escalate service outages to Coinbase senior management to ensure timely resolution.&lt
Create, document and review tools necessary to effectively sell clients on new integrations and products via APIs and developed software.&lt
&lt
Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field required&lt
Expertise in the cryptocurrency and blockchain space, including familiarity with digital asset infrastructure&lt
Extensive experience with enterprise software architecture, distributed systems, cloud infrastructure (potentially including AWS), and real-time data processing.&lt
Hands on experience working with standard trading API protocols including FIX, REST, Websockets, and JSON RPC is required&lt

Essential experience includes integration with traditional financial (TradFi) or crypto exchanges, particularly utilizing FIX protocol. Experience with binary protocols and multicast is also advantageous.&lt
Understanding of general market dynamics and participants and experience with future and option markets is required,&lt
Understanding of the importance of latency for clients and impact on trading strategies&amp
Proficiency in modern programming languages and familiarity with technologies used for building high-speed trading platforms.&lt
Exceptional interpersonal skills. Ability to engage C level decision makers on product and technology&lt
Ideal candidate must be self-motivated and develop a deep understanding of Coinbase product and technical stack&lt
Organized and analytical. Able to distill sophisticated and ambiguous requirements into clear results&lt
&amp

column9: The CX Compliance team is essential in ensuring that our global CX Compliance Operations function efficiently, comply with regulatory requirements, and consistently deliver high-quality resolutions. As a TMS Compliance Analyst III, Compliance TMS Operations within the CX Compliance team, you will be responsible for conducting end-to-end Transaction Monitoring investigations for customers (individuals/entities) that may lead to drafting and filing a SAR. You will work extensively with functional leaders in the Financial Crime Risk Service line and support functions to maintain production and quality of the highest standard. You will work independently, prioritizing multiple tasks with minimal guidance, and remain open to feedback from all levels to drive continuous improvement in compliance handling.&lt

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Conduct investigative review and analysis in support of company’s BSA/AML regulatory compliance policies and programs including investigating automated alerts from our transaction monitoring systems, and referrals sourced from law enforcement requests and other company lines of business&lt

Analyze transaction activity and KYC information and conduct due diligence research in support of investigations as well as interpret evidence from external tools and systems to determine the legitimacy of customer behavior across multiple products&lt
Document investigations in written narratives&lt
Decide whether activity warrants escalation for additional review and subsequently recommend whether activity appears suspicious and warrants filing of a suspicious activity report&lt
Incorporate feedback from Quality Assurance Team&lt
Maintain detailed documentation to demonstrate compliance with regulations and internal policies and procedures&amp
Remain current with industry standards and developments in the areas of KYC, BSA/AML, and OFAC, and apply regulatory requirements and internal policies and procedures to case investigation&lt
Review data from systems and following Coinbase procedures to investigate, decide, and document transaction monitoring alerts&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: Minimum of 4 years of relevant experience in financial services, crypto, investigations, legal, or the tech industry, with a focus on TMS, compliance, or regulatory matters&lt
Relevant experience in SAR narrative drafting and filing&lt
Strong interpersonal, analytical, and communication (verbal and written) skills&lt
Experience working with Google Sheet, Google Doc, Excel, Word&lt
Flexible and adaptable to the evolving needs of a high-growth and fast paced organization environment&lt
Ready to support in 24*7 environment&lt
Organized with a high level of attention to detail&lt
&lt
Professional certification in AML or Fraud (e.g. CAMS, CFCS, CFE)&amp
Experience in project management, analytics, or vendor management&lt
Advanced degree in business, finance, or customer experience (CX)&lt
Proficiency with tools such as Google apps, JIRA, Hummingbird, and Salesforce Service Cloud.&lt
Experience collaborating with external outsource business partners&lt

column9: The Trade Surveillance Associate will be responsible for trade surveillance for Coinbase on an ongoing basis. This position will be remote but should anticipate some travel.&lt

column4: perform market assessments for new asset launches and relaunches following trading halts&lt

column3: Perform other aspects of Compliance, where needed&amp

column9: The CX Compliance team plays a critical role in ensuring our global Compliance Operations run smoothly, adhere to regulatory standards, and deliver consistently high-quality outcomes. As a Lead Analyst, Compliance TMS Operations, you will take ownership of end-to-end Transaction Monitoring investigations involving both individuals and entities, which may result in the drafting and filing of Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs). This role requires strong experience in quality control and a proactive approach to working with various stakeholders across the Financial Crime Risk service line and support teams. You&#39
column10: ll navigate complex scenarios and issues, balancing high-volume workloads with exceptional attention to detail. Operating with minimal supervision, you&#39
column11: ll prioritize effectively, collaborate cross-functionally, and remain open to feedback to support continuous improvement and operational excellence.&lt

column3: &lt
Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience in financial services, crypto, investigations, legal, or the tech industry, with a focus on TMS, compliance, or regulatory matters.&lt
Relevant experience in drafting suspicious transaction reports in the format provided by Singapore Police Force and filing it on the SONAR portal&lt
Able to identify red flag indicators and populate them correctly in the STR files&lt

Conduct investigative review and analysis in support of company’s AML regulatory compliance policies and programs including investigating automated alerts from our transaction monitoring systems, and referrals sourced from law enforcement requests and other company lines of business&lt

Analyze transaction activity and KYC information and conduct due diligence research in support of investigations as well as interpret evidence from external tools and systems to determine the legitimacy of customer behavior across multiple products&lt
Document investigations in written narratives&lt
Decide whether activity warrants escalation for additional review and subsequently recommend whether activity appears suspicious and warrants filing of a suspicious activity report&lt
Incorporate feedback from Quality Assurance Team&lt
Maintain detailed documentation to demonstrate compliance with regulations and internal policies and procedures&amp
Remain current with industry standards and developments in the areas of KYC, BSA/AML, and OFAC, and apply regulatory requirements and internal policies and procedures to case investigation&lt
Review data from systems and following Coinbase procedures to investigate, decide, and document transaction monitoring alerts&lt
&lt

Organized with a High level of attention to detail&lt
&lt

Experience in project management, analytics, or vendor management&lt
Advanced degree in business, finance, or customer experience (CX)&lt
Proficiency with tools such as Google apps, JIRA, Hummingbird, and Salesforce Service Cloud.&lt
Experience collaborating with external outsource business partners&lt

This is a 12-week internship during summer 2026.&amp

Coinbase is seeking interns to join our User Research team to understand user needs for existing products like Coinbase Cloud and tools for developers. You will contribute to unique, large scale, highly complex product problems. You will help researchers, designers, and product managers craft thoughtful experiences to help enable all people to engage with the crypto economy. You don’t need to be an expert on cryptocurrency to join us—we welcome folks at many different moments in their cryptocurrency journey. We only ask that you have a basic knowledge of cryptocurrency and Coinbase’s role in it, and an interest in learning more.&lt
&lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: Work on one or more research projects with other researchers, designers, and product managers to investigate a product problem or area&lt
Learn how to plan and execute research to solve complex and ambiguous product problems&lt
Craft one or more research reports to clearly communicate your findings and make impactful design and product recommendations for the team&lt
&lt
column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: Actively seeking a career in user research&lt
Working knowledge of general research principles (experimental design, bias, confounds, etc.) and UX research principles (usability testing, design thinking, etc.)&lt
Self-motivated and committed to personal growth&lt
Approach problems with positive energy&lt
&lt
Currently pursuing a degree or certificate in a research-related field or pursuing user research extracurricularly while enrolled in a Bachelors program&lt
Enjoy thinking about how people interact with products, with a natural curiosity to understand others’ mental models and motivations&lt
&lt
&lt
column5: Final report from a past research project:&lt

column9: Coinbase is looking for a compliance engineering focused VP of Technology Risk and Controls reporting to Coinbase’s CSO. In this role you will oversee the team responsible for managing technology-related compliance and risk workflows. This role will work crossfunctionally with Internal Audit, Operations Risk, ERM in addition to product and engineering teams across the company to ensure Coinbase effectively identifies and manages its technology risk surface.&amp

column3: &lt
column5: What you’ll be doing (ie. job duties):&lt

column3: &lt
column9: , defining and driving the second line framework across the security and technology functions of the company (cybersecurity, IT, EAA, data privacy, physical security, product and engineering, HRIS, etc).&lt

column3: &lt
column5: Embed risk management into global product, engineering, legal, finance, sales, and operations&lt
column7: teams by building security and privacy controls into product roadmaps and onboarding systems/processes into compliance requirements.&lt

column3: &lt
column7: by ensuring Coinbase meets the highest bar on compliance and regulatory readiness while continuing to enable innovation at scale.&lt

column5: What we look for in you (ie. job requirements):&lt

column3: 15+ years in technology/security risk, IT audit, or related domain, including 10+ years leading teams&lt
Deep expertise across the risk lifecycle
column4: proven ability to embed frameworks (NIST, ISO, COBIT, DORA, FAIR) into operations.&lt

column3: Clear communicator who aligns technical and non-technical leaders, regulators, and cross-functional stakeholders&lt
Strategic operator who balances vision with execution
Data-driven leader with experience building scalable, automated solutions in cloud environments.&lt
Resilient and self-motivated, effective under pressure, and adept at managing multiple priorities in high-growth, regulated environments.&lt

Demonstrates the ability to responsibly use generative AI tools and copilots (e.g., LibreChat, Gemini, Glean) in daily workflows, continuously learn as tools evolve, and apply human-in-the-loop practices to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in efficiency, cost, and quality.&lt
&lt
Experience in financial services and/or fintech/crypto&lt
Experience at a public company&lt
Information security risk management qualifications like CRISC, CISM, CISA, etc.&lt
